overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a large bird of prey flying from a narrow rocky river canyon out to a vast lake at dusk. The camera smoothly tracks the bird as it glides over water and landscape, transitioning from enclosed rocky terrain to open coastal areas with distant mountains and eventually approaching a small lakeside settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river canyon with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: gliding steadily through the narrow canyon following the winding river path below

entered.detail: steep gray rock cliff face rising on the left side of the canyon
steep gray rock cliff face rising on the right side of the canyon
narrow flowing water with visible rocks beneath the surface
scattered evergreen trees on the canyon rim
boulders and stones protruding from the river water

segments.scene_description: The bird flies through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. Below, a shallow river flows over scattered boulders, while pine trees line the distant canyon rims under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: river mouth transitioning to open lake

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into the expansive open lake vista
ambient light dims slightly as the bird moves further from the canyon shadows over the water

agents.ego_description: soaring out of the canyon confines and over the widening river mouth toward the vast lake

entered.detail: expansive dark water body stretching to the horizon
hazy mountain silhouettes visible across the lake
widening river mouth where the stream meets the lake

segments.scene_description: The canyon walls fall away as the bird emerges into a wide-open lake vista. The river widens into a delta before the dark expanse of the lake, with distant mountains visible under the heavy overcast sky.

events.description: bird banks left to follow the contour of the rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: banking left to follow the rocky coastline with the lake waters visible to the left side

entered.detail: jagged rock formations along the water's edge
shingle and pebble beach between the rocks and grass
scattered evergreen trees on the coastal grassland

segments.scene_description: The bird follows the rugged lakeshore, banking left with the water now to the left side. Rocky outcrops and gravel beaches line the coast, while scattered pine trees dot the grassy terrain to the right.

events.description: approaching the wooden settlement buildings on the coastal ridge

agents.ego_description: flying lower and slower as it approaches the settlement buildings near the shore

entered.detail: distinctive wooden church building with steeple on the coastal ridge
cluster of wooden cabins and structures forming a small lakeside town
unpaved tracks and roads between the settlement buildings

segments.scene_description: The bird descends toward a small lakeside settlement, revealing wooden buildings and a church with a steeple on the coastal ridge. Dirt paths connect the structures as the terrain transitions from rocky shore to grassy hills, with the lake now visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a bird of prey as it transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open lakeside landscape at dusk. It begins by gliding through a narrow gorge with steep cliff walls and a shallow river flowing over boulders below. As the bird emerges from the canyon, the walls fall away to reveal a wide-open vista where the river widens into a delta and opens into a dark, expansive lake beneath a heavy overcast sky. The camera then banks left to follow the rugged lakeshore, passing rocky outcrops and gravel beaches while pine trees dot the grassy terrain to the right. Finally, the bird descends toward a small lakeside settlement, shifting the focus from the distant water to wooden buildings and a church steeple nestled among grassy hills and dirt paths.
